_meta.description: Master shared chapter templates. Edit here, push to all categories. Categories can override.

blocks.label: Request for Quotation
Delivery Terms
blocks.text:
Delivery: {{deliveryTerm}} to {{siteAddress}}, {{siteZip}} {{siteCity}}.

The Supplier shall include in the quotation:
- Price per load / per delivery
- Maximum load capacity (kg and units per load)
- Maximum transportable dimensions
- Unloading requirements (crane capacity, forklift, manual)
- Maximum waiting time included in delivery price

Schedule:
- Delivery period: {{deliveryPeriod}}
- Confirm production lead time after receipt of approved shop drawings
- Coordinate deliveries minimum {{scheduleLeadDays}} working days in advance
- Delivery sequence per erection / installation plan (if applicable)

Packaging: included in price, or surcharge to be stated explicitly.

The Supplier bears full responsibility for transport damage until completion of unloading. Damaged or defective items shall be replaced within {{replacementDays}} working days at the Supplier's cost, including transport.

Quantities stated are indicative. STM reserves the right to adjust quantities by +/- {{quantityTolerance}}% without price change per unit rate.

variables.label: Delivery period
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall state the earliest available delivery period and confirm production lead time from order confirmation.

blocks.label: Execution Terms
blocks.text:
Site: {{siteAddress}}, {{siteZip}} {{siteCity}}.

Working hours: {{workingHours}}
Estimated duration: {{duration}}
Start date: {{startDate}} (subject to coordination with main contractor)

The Supplier shall:
- Mobilise equipment and personnel within {{mobiliseDays}} working days after written instruction to commence
- Coordinate with STM's site manager regarding access, sequence, and interfaces with other trades
- Provide daily progress reporting if requested by STM
- Maintain site cleanliness and manage own waste and debris
- Reinstate any damage to existing surfaces, structures, or services caused by the Supplier's operations

The Supplier bears full responsibility for all equipment, temporary facilities, consumables, and personnel required for the execution of the works.

Quantities stated are indicative and based on drawings. Final quantities shall be measured on site. STM reserves the right to adjust the scope by +/- {{quantityTolerance}}% without change to unit rates.

variables.label: Est. duration
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall state the estimated duration based on the described scope and confirm resource availability.

variables.label: Start date
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall state the earliest available start date.

blocks.label: Price Structure
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall provide a complete price breakdown as follows:

{{priceBreakdownItems}}

Base price shall include: all materials, production, quality control, testing, documentation, and CE marking (where applicable).

Surcharges — the Supplier shall state explicitly:
{{surchargeItems}}

Price validity: minimum {{validityDays}} days from date of quotation.
State clearly if prices are subject to a material index and specify which index applies.

Payment terms: {{paymentDays}} days after date of invoice.

Surcharges, exclusions, or limitations not explicitly stated in the Supplier's quotation are deemed included in the base price and cannot be invoiced separately.

blocks.label: Scope Exclusions
blocks.text:
The following items are excluded from this scope and are procured separately by STM:

{{exclusionItems}}

The Supplier shall state any additional exclusions in the quotation. Items not listed above and not explicitly excluded by the Supplier in the quotation are deemed included in the Supplier's scope and price.

Installation instructions, technical documentation, and processing guidelines shall be provided at no additional cost.

blocks.label: Submission Requirements
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall submit the quotation to {{stmContact}} at {{stmEmail}} before {{deadline}}.

The quotation shall include:
{{requiredDocuments}}

Incomplete quotations may be rejected without further consideration.

STM is not obligated to award the contract to the lowest bidder or to any bidder.

This Request for Quotation does not constitute a commitment to place an order. STM reserves the right to cancel this RFQ at any time without obligation.
